description: JUnit test class for NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor, testing environment variable to JDBC URL conversion logic.

classes.name: NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessorTest
classes.description: Test class for NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor, verifying URL transformations.

methods.name: convertsNeonPostgresUrlToJdbc
methods.description: Tests conversion of a Neon postgres URL in DATABASE_URL environment variable to JDBC URL format.

methods.name: prefersExistingJdbcUrl
methods.description: Ensures existing spring.datasource.url is preserved over DATABASE_URL conversion.

methods.name: handlesSslMode
methods.description: Tests handling of SSL mode in the DATABASE_URL conversion process.
